_doc: Sample data-driven spawn profile for the jungle petshop's cage_3 marker. Profile JSONs are OPTIONAL — when absent, the CTOV compat layer uses the per-village biome tag (domesticationinnovation:petshop_cage_jungle for the jungle variant). When present, the profile's 'entries' array takes precedence over the DI fallback tag (but NOT over the primary biome tag — entries are only consulted if the primary tag is empty). Use 'ctov_tag' / 'di_fallback_tag' to override the tag IDs used at runtime. Each entry supports: entity (required), weight (int, default 1), baby (bool, optional), age (int, optional, may be negative — e.g. -60000 for a permanent baby that will never age up).
